title: Nanotrap¬ģ KingFisher‚ĄĘ Concentration/Extraction & MagMAX KingFisher‚ĄĘ Extraction
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"33ulp","text":"These protocols have been adapted from Ceres \"Nanotrap¬ģ Wastewater Protocol using MagMAX Kits\" (APP-030, Revision 0, Nov 2021). ","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"67l4v","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5kjgh","text":"This protocol uses Nanotrap¬ģ Magnetic Virus Particles and Nanotrap¬ģ Enhancement Reagent 1 (ER1) to capture and concentrate viruses in wastewater samples. It is optimized for viral capture from 10 mL samples of wastewater and is compatible with three nucleic acid extraction kits from ThermoFisher. This protocol has been used and adapted for SARS-CoV-2 viral capture at Emory University for wastewater surveillance of COVID-19.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Label two KingFisher‚ĄĘ 24 Well Deep Well sample plates ‚ÄúSample Plate 1‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúSample Plate 2‚ÄĚ. You will split the total sample volume to process across the two plates for each sample. Plastics for 24 deep-well format (KingFisher, 95040470, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/95040470 ) Two Labeled KingFisher‚ĄĘ 24 Well Deep Well sample plates

Aliquot 10 ¬ĶL of Bovine Respiratory Syncytial Virus ( BRSV ) INFORCE 3 Intranasal Bovine Vaccine Zoetis Catalog #INF-00089 to every well in Sample Plate 1 that will receive a wastewater sample. BRSV acts as a positive control and is only added to Sample Plate 1. Do NOT add BRSV to Sample Plate 2.

Aliquot 4865 ¬ĶL of wastewater sample to one well (one well per sample) of Sample Plate 1 (the new KingFisher‚ĄĘ 24 Well Deep Well sample plate). Wastewater sample is aliquoted into well A1 of Sample Plate 1.
Aliquot another 4865 ¬ĶL of wastewater sample to the same well on Sample Plate 2 (a second KingFisher‚ĄĘ 24 Well Deep Well sample plate).

Designate the same well on Sample Plate 1 and Sample Plate 2 as a negative control. Add 4865 ¬ĶL of Molecular Biology Grade Water Corning Catalog #46-000-CM into the designated well on both sample plates. Do NOT introduce BRSV or wastewater into these two designated wells.
Aliquot 50 ¬ĶL of Enhancement Reagent 1 Ceres Nano Catalog #10111-10 to each wastewater sample well, including the negative control well, in both sample plates.
Incubate the sample plates for 00:10:00 at 20 ¬įC, Room temperature After adding Ceres Nanosciences Nanotrap¬ģ Enhancement Reagent 1, incubate both sample plates at room temperature for 10 minutes.

Aliquot 75 ¬ĶL of Nanotrap Magnetic Virus Particles (10) Ceres Nano Catalog #44202 to each wastewater sample well, including the negative control well, in both sample plates. Prior to use, the product Nanotrap particles should be vortexed and thoroughly mixed.

Insert the KingFisher‚ĄĘ 24 well-KF Deep Well Comb into Sample Plate 1. Plastics for 24 deep-well tip comb and plate format (KingFisher, 97002610, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/97002610?SID=srch-hj-97002610 )

For example, if you loaded a sample into well A1 of Sample Plate 1, load the second volume of that sample into well A1 of Sample Plate 2. Wastewater sample is aliquoted into well A1 of Sample Plate 2.

Prepare Wash 1 Plate by aliquoting 1 mL of MagMAX Wash Buffer to a new KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate matching the number and location of the KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate-Sample Plate wells. Applied Biosystems‚ĄĘ MagMAX‚ĄĘ Viral/Pathogen Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit contains: Wash Buffer Binding Buffer Elution Buffer Proteinase K MagMAX Beads MagMAX‚ĄĘ (Viral/Pathogen Nucleic Acid Isolation Kit, Applied Biosystems‚ĄĘ, A42352, https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/A42352?SID=srch-srp-A42352 )

Prepare the Lysis Plate by aliquoting 500 ¬ĶL of MagMAX™ Microbiome Lysis Solution Thermo Fisher Catalog #A42361 to a third Kingfisher‚ĄĘ 24 Deep-Well Plate matching the number and location of the ‚ÄúSample Plate‚ÄĚ wells.

Run NT KingFisher‚ĄĘ Script If using a Kingfisher‚ĄĘ Flex System, run KF-008-WW-Nanotrap-24.bdz . If using a Kingfisher‚ĄĘ Apex System, run KF-003-WW-Nanotrap-24.kfx . Follow the on-screen instructions loading the previously prepared plates at the appropriate time.
Once the protocol is completed, the KingFisher‚ĄĘ plate to which lysis solution was added will contain 500 ¬ĶL of lysate that is ready to be run on the MagMAX KF extraction procedure.
Prepare the Elution Plate by aliquoting 60 ¬ĶL of MagMAX Elution buffer to a new KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 - 200 ¬ĶL plate matching the number and location of the ‚ÄúSample Plate‚ÄĚ wells.
To prepare the Binding Plate , obtain a new KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate.
Aliquot 10 ¬ĶL of MagMAX Proteinase K to each well in the Binding Plate in which lysate will be added.

Aliquot 400 ¬ĶL of the lysate from each well of the lysis plate used in Part 1 of the protocol into the Binding Plate. Keep track of which well contains which sample in this new bead binding plate. There should be about 100 őľL of lysate remaining in each well of the lysis plate which can be discarded.
Aliquot 530 ¬ĶL of MagMAX Binding Solution into each deep well which lysate was added in the Binding Plate.
Vortex and thoroughly mix the MagMAX DNA/RNA Binding Beads.
Prepare Wash Plate 2 by aliquoting 1 mL of 80% EtOH to a new KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate matching the number and location of the KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate-Sample Plate wells.
Insert the KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Comb into the Binding Plate.

Aliquot 20 ¬ĶL of vortexed binding beads to each well in which lysate was added in the Binding Plate. The total final volume should be 960 ¬ĶL in each sample-containing well of this plate. If volume exceeds 1000 ¬ĶL, the possibility of contamination via spillage into adjacent wells can occur.

Run MagMAX KingFisher‚ĄĘ Protocol If using a Kingfisher‚ĄĘ Flex System, run KF-008-WW-MagMAX-96.bdz . If using a Kingfisher‚ĄĘ Apex System, run KF-003-WW-MagMAX-96.kfx . Follow the on-screen instructions loading the previously prepared plates at the appropriate time.

Once the protocol is completed, the KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96-Elution Plate will contain ~60 ¬ĶL purified viral RNA that is ready to be loaded onto a PCR plate or 1.7 mL RNA tube. KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96-Elution Plate will contain ~60 ¬ĶL purified viral RNA that is ready to be loaded onto a PCR plate or 1.7 mL RNA tube.

Label four KingFisher‚ĄĘ 96 Deep Well Plate-Sample Plate wells "Wash 1", "Binding", "Wash 2", and "Elution". During the MagMAX KingFisher‚ĄĘ Extraction Procedure, the following plates will be prepared: Wash 1, Binding, Wash 2, and Elution.
